Intraday post (09/June), Reversion trading setup

In the weekly post I already covered the main dynamics for the week. We have strong bullish imbalance, and market confirmed the positive drift. I, personally, find more edge in the vol market this week.

Here, coding today’s positioning:

We can see the IC, and 6022 as a very significant pivot (likely a strong resistance), also zero vanna line. Momentum has a chance to break through it before 11:20am, but after that, it is very much a resistance back towards 5997 first, and 5971.50 as main target for long (also downside pivot). If price would break below this (vol catching up), 5946 is the absolute low, based on vol profile.The speed profile is strongly positive. Today, any vol selling would push the price toward the 6022 vanna flip. Upside pivot is 6046.00; prety high vol would be needed to break through this line, but the local high positive gamma swallows any vol upstick here. Charm profile is flat. Today is a good setup for reversion trading. Be patient and wait for the lvls and dynamics to show up, jump into the position you spotted out, then leave. One, or two trade at max. No more edge on intraday trading. Small by small everyday.

(Description is here)
